entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A devastating disease affecting chickpea caused by Ascochyta rabiei L.

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI L.
entities.description: The causal agent of Ascochyta blight in chickpea.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop susceptible to Ascochyta blight.

entities.name: F2 MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A segregating population derived from chickpea cultivars with contrasting disease reactions, used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: STMS
entities.description: A type of molecular marker used for genetic mapping and linkage analysis.

entities.name: ICCM
entities.description: A type of molecular marker used for genetic mapping and linkage analysis.

entities.name: AB RESISTANCE GENE
entities.description: A gene conferring resistance to Ascochyta blight in chickpea.

entities.name: LG5
entities.description: Linkage Group 5 of the chickpea genome.

entities.name: TA 42
entities.description: A molecular marker flanking the AB resistance gene on LG5.

entities.name: TR 35
entities.description: A molecular marker flanking the AB resistance gene on LG5.

entities.name: MAPMAKER
entities.description: Software used for constructing genetic linkage maps.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS 1, 3, 5 AND 7
entities.description: Specific regions within the chickpea genome exhibiting synteny.
